Short CV

Dr. Müge Ensari Özay was born in İzmir in 1972. She graduated from the Department of Chemistry at the Faculty of Science and Literature at Boğaziçi University in 1997. After completing her master's degree in Environmental Sciences Institute at Boğaziçi University in 2000, he completed doctorate education in Chemistry Department at Boğaziçi University in 2005.

Between 1999 and 2007 she worked as a research assistant at the Department of Chemistry at Boğaziçi University. Between 2007 and 2011, he worked various positions in the private sector. Between 2011 and 2015, he worked full-time as an occupational health and safety specialist at the Druz OSGB (Common Health and Safety Unit) and the Training Center for Occupational Health and Work Safety. She worked as a lecturer in Occupational Health and Safety program at the Vocational School of Health Services of Işık University between 2014 and 2018. Since 2017, she has started to lecture in at undergraduate and graduate course in Occupational Health and Safety Departments of Üsküdar University and Istanbul Medeniyet University. At 2018, she started to work full time in Üsküdar University as an assistant professor.
